<!DOCTYPE html>
<html class="no-js glue-flexbox  keyword-blog" lang="en-us" data-locale="en-us" data-version="pr20260715-1455">
    <head>
        <meta charset="utf-8" />
        <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge" />
        <title>Connect more of your apps to Search</title>
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=1.0, minimum-scale=1.0" />
        <meta name="optimize_experiments" content="[]">

        
  




<!--Article Specific Metadata-->
<meta name="description" content="You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode."/>
<meta name="keywords" content="None"/>
<meta name="article-author" content="Chips Mistry, Biharck Araújo"/>
<meta name="robots" content="max-image-preview:large">

<!--Open Graph Metadata-->
<meta property="og:type" content="article" />
<meta property="og:title" content="Connect more of your apps to Search"/>

<meta property="og:description" content="You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode." />
<meta property="og:image" content="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/ConnectedAppshero.width-1300.png" />
<meta property="og:site_name" content="Google" />
<meta property="og:url" content="https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/connected-apps/" />
<meta property="article:publisher" content="https://www.facebook.com/Google/" />
<meta property="article:published_time" content="2026-07-16" />

<!--Twitter Card Metadata-->
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />

<meta name="twitter:title" content="Connect more of your apps to Search"/>
<meta name="twitter:description" content="You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode." />
<meta name="twitter:image:src" content="https://storage.googleapis.com/gweb-uniblog-publish-prod/images/ConnectedAppshero.width-1300.png" />

  <style>@layer base,legacy,legacy-overrides,tokens,components,pages,themes;@layer base{html{-webkit-text-size-adjust:100%;-moz-text-size-adjust:100%;text-size-adjust:100%;font-family:sans-serif}body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;margin:0;min-height:100vh;overflow-x:hidden}article,details,footer,header,main,nav,section,summary{display:block}sup,video{vertical-align:initial}video{display:inline-block}a{background:0 0}a:active,a:hover,main{outline:0}b{font-weight:700}h1{font-size:2em}small{font-size:80%}sup{font-size:75%;line-height:0;position:relative;top:-.5em}img{border:0}svg:not(:root){overflow:hidden}hr{box-sizing:initial;height:0}button,input,select{color:inherit;font:inherit;margin:0}button{-webkit-appearance:button;-moz-appearance:button;appearance:button;cursor:pointer;overflow:visible}button,select{text-transform:none}button[disabled]{cursor:default}button::-moz-focus-inner,input::-moz-focus-inner{border:0;padding:0}input{-webkit-hyphens:none;hyphens:none;line-height:normal}input[type=search]{-webkit-appearance:textfield;-moz-appearance:textfield;appearance:textfield;box-sizing:initial}input[type=search]::-webkit-search-cancel-button,input[type=search]::-webkit-search-decoration{-webkit-appearance:none;appearance:none}div,form,h1,h2,h3,h4,li,ol,p,ul{margin:0;padding:0}[data-loading]{filter:blur(6px);transition:all .4s ease-in}[slot]{display:none}*,.uni-page,:after,:before{box-sizing:border-box}.uni-page{margin-inline:auto;max-width:1440px;max-width:var(--grid-max-width,1440px);padding-inline:16px;padding-inline:var(--grid-margin,16px);width:100%}.uni-page--fullbleed{max-width:none;padding-inline:0}.uni-grid{grid-gap:12px;grid-gap:var(--grid-gap,16px);display:grid;gap:12px;gap:var(--grid-gap,16px);grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));grid-template-columns:repeat(var(--grid-columns,4),minmax(0,1fr));width:100%}[class*=uni-grid__col--span-]{grid-column-end:span 4;grid-column-end:span var(--grid-columns,4)}.uni-grid__col--span-4{grid-column-end:span 4}.uni-grid__col--span-12{grid-column-end:span 12}@media(min-width:481px){.uni-grid__col--span-6-tablet{grid-column-end:span 6}.uni-grid__col--span-8-tablet{grid-column-end:span 8}.uni-grid__col--span-12-tablet{grid-column-end:span 12}.uni-grid__col--start-1-tablet{grid-column-start:1}.uni-grid__col--start-3-tablet{grid-column-start:3}}@media(min-width:1025px){.uni-grid__col--span-2-desktop{grid-column-end:span 2}.uni-grid__col--span-8-desktop{grid-column-end:span 8}.uni-grid__col--start-3-desktop{grid-column-start:3}}.uni-grid__col--layout-6{grid-column:1/-1}@media(min-width:1025px){.uni-grid__col--layout-6{grid-column:4/span 6}}.uni-grid__col--layout-8{grid-column:1/-1}@media(min-width:1025px){.uni-grid__col--layout-8{grid-column:3/span 8}}.site-content{flex:1 0 0}}@layer legacy{html{--google-font-family:"Google Sans",roboto,arial,helvetica;--roboto-font-family:"Google Sans",roboto,arial,helvetica;--roboto-mono-font-family:"Roboto mono",monospace,arial,helvetica;--noto-color-emoji:"Noto Color Emoji",sans-serif;--uni-waze-boing-regular:"WazeBoingRegular";font-size:18px}body{word-wrap:break-word;background:#fff;color:#5f6368;cursor:auto;font-family:Google Sans,roboto,arial,helvetica;font-family:var(--roboto-font-family);font-size:1em;font-style:normal;font-weight:300;line-height:1.444;margin:0;padding:0}body:after{content:"x-small";display:none}@media(min-width:600px){body:after{content:"small"}}@media(min-width:1024px){body:after{content:"medium"}}@media(min-width:1440px){body:after{content:"large"}}.h-c-copy,.rich-text,li,p{font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.25px;line-height:1.7142857143}p+p{margin-top:12px}@media(min-width:600px){.h-c-copy,.rich-text,p{font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.25px;line-height:1.7142857143}}@media(min-width:1024px){.h-c-copy,.rich-text,p{font-size:16px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.625}p+p{margin-top:16px}}hr{border:solid #dadce0;border-width:1px 0 0;clear:both;height:0;margin-bottom:19px;margin-top:20px}i{font-style:italic}b{font-weight:700}a{color:#1a73e8;-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none}a:visited{color:#7b1fa2}a:focus,a:hover{-webkit-text-decoration:none;text-decoration:none}a:focus{background:#f1f3f4;outline:4px solid rgba(32,33,36,.06)}a:active{outline:2px auto Highlight;outline:5px auto -webkit-focus-ring-color}a img{border:0}ol,ul,ul li ul{margin-left:20px}ol,ul{list-style-position:outside;margin-bottom:20px}ul li ul{margin-bottom:0}@media(min-width:600px){li{font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.25px;line-height:1.7142857143}}@media(min-width:1024px){li{font-size:16px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.625}}img{-ms-interpolation-mode:bicubic;display:inline-block;height:auto;max-width:100%;vertical-align:middle}select{width:100%}h1,h2,h3,h4{-moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;word-wrap:normal;color:#202124;font-family:Google Sans,roboto,arial,helvetica;font-family:var(--google-font-family);font-size:32px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.25;text-rendering:optimizeLegibility}@media(min-width:600px){h1{font-size:38px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.1578947368}}@media(min-width:1024px){h1{font-size:56px;letter-spacing:-.5px;line-height:1.1785714286}}h2,h3,h4{font-size:24px;line-height:1.3333333333}@media(min-width:600px){h2{font-size:32px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.25}}@media(min-width:1024px){h2{font-size:44px;letter-spacing:-.5px;line-height:1.1818181818}}h3,h4{font-size:20px;line-height:1.4}@media(min-width:600px){h3{font-size:24px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.3333333333}}@media(min-width:1024px){h3{font-size:32px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.25}}h4{font-size:16px;line-height:1.625}@media(min-width:600px){h4{font-size:16px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.625}}@media(min-width:1024px){h4{font-size:22px;letter-spacing:0;line-height:1.3636363636}}a:focus .focusable{outline:1px dotted #212121;outline:5px auto -webkit-focus-ring-color}.rich-text>p{font-size:inherit;line-height:inherit}.uni-progressive-image--blur{filter:blur(4px)}.uni-progressive-image--no-blur{filter:blur(0);transition:all .3s cubic-bezier(.6,-.28,.74,.05)!important}h2{margin-bottom:20px}@media(min-width:1024px){h2{margin-bottom:40px}}h1,h2,h3,h4{-webkit-hyphens:manual;hyphens:manual}body p{font-family:Google Sans,roboto,arial,helvetica;font-family:var(--google-font-family);font-size:16px;font-style:normal;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:normal;line-height:28px}a:hover{cursor:pointer}a:focus,a:hover,a:visited{color:#174ea6}a:focus{background:0 0;border-radius:2px;outline:2px solid #174ea6;outline-offset:0}[slot]{display:none}.uni-component-spacing{margin-block-end:60px}@media(min-width:1024px){.uni-component-spacing{margin-block-end:80px}}.h-c-icon{fill:currentColor;display:inline-block}.h-c-icon--24px{height:24px;width:24px}.h-c-icon--social{fill:#202124;padding:2px;vertical-align:top}.h-c-icon--color-text{fill:#202124}a:visited.kw-button--high-emphasis{background-color:#1a73e8;color:#fff;display:block;padding:13px 24px 11px;text-align:center}a:visited.kw-button--high-emphasis:hover{background-color:#185abc;color:#fff}@media(forced-colors:active){a:visited.kw-button--high-emphasis:hover{border:2px solid #1a73e8}}@media(prefers-contrast:forced){a:visited.kw-button--high-emphasis:hover{border:2px solid #1a73e8}}a:visited.kw-button--high-emphasis:focus{background:0 0;background-color:#185abc;border-radius:4px;color:#fff;outline:2px solid #174ea6;outline-color:#aecbfa;outline-offset:0}a:visited.kw-button--high-emphasis:active{background-color:#185abc}a:hover .cta{color:#4285f4}a:hover .cta .icon{fill:currentColor;transform:translateX(5px)}a:hover .cta .icon--down{transform:translateX(0)}@keyframes dash{0%{stroke-dasharray:1,200;stroke-dashoffset:0}50%{stroke-dasharray:89,200;stroke-dashoffset:-35px}to{stroke-dasharray:89,200;stroke-dashoffset:-124px}}uni-icon-component{align-items:center;display:inline-flex}uni-portal{display:contents}uni-portal[destination]{display:block}}@layer legacy-overrides{.redesign-patch ul{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0}.redesign-patch h3,.redesign-patch p,.redesign-patch span{color:inherit}}@layer 100%),var(--color-grey-0);--gd-aquamarine--tertiary-feed:linear-gradient(0deg,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--bg-surfaces-secondary) 80%,transparent) -0.29%,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--color-aurora-blue-plus6) 80%,transparent) 40.78%,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--color-aurora-blue-plus5) 80%,transparent) 65.85%,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--color-green-50) 80%,transparent) 98.93%),var(--bg-surfaces-main);--gd-green--tertiary-feed:linear-gradient(0deg,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--bg-surfaces-secondary) 50%,transparent) 0%,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--color-green-50) 0%,var(--color-aurora-blue-plus3) 100%);--gd-purple-quaternary:linear-gradient(59deg,var(--color-aurora-soft-purple-plus4) 0%,var(--color-aurora-soft-purple-plus3) 100%);--gd-yellow-quaternary:linear-gradient(180deg,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--color-red-50) 30%,#fff) 49.52%,color-mix(in sRGB,var(--color-yellow-200) 30%,#fff) 100%);--gd-aquamarine-quaternary:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--color-aurora-blue-plus4) 0%,var(--color-green-50) 100%);--gd-green-quaternary:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--color-aurora-green-plus4) -38.82%,var(--color-green-100) 100.11%);--gd-grey-quaternary:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--color-grey-100) 0%,var(--color-grey-300) 100%);--elevation-none:none;--elevation-nav:0 8px 12px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.04);--elevation-1:0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.3),0 1px 3px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.15);--elevation-2:0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.3),0 2px 6px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.15);--elevation-3:0 4px 8px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3);--grid-max-width:1440px;--breakpoints-grid-margin:16px;--grid-columns:4;--grid-gap:var(--spacer-1-plus);--grid-margin:var(--breakpoints-grid-margin)}@media(min-width:481px){:root{--breakpoints-grid-margin:48px;--grid-columns:12;--grid-gap:var(--spacer-2)}}@media(min-width:1025px){:root{--breakpoints-grid-margin:72px;--grid-columns:12;--grid-gap:var(--spacer-3)}}:root{--motion-expressive-fast-spatial:cubic-bezier(0.42,1.67,0.21,0.9);--motion-expressive-default-spatial:cubic-bezier(0.38,1.21,0.22,1);--motion-expressive-slow-spatial:cubic-bezier(0.39,1.29,0.35,0.98);--motion-expressive-fast-effects:cubic-bezier(0.31,0.94,0.34,1);--motion-expressive-default-effects:cubic-bezier(0.34,0.8,0.34,1);--motion-expressive-slow-effects:cubic-bezier(0.34,0.88,0.34,1);--motion-standard-fast-spatial:cubic-bezier(0.27,1.06,0.18,1);--motion-standard-default-spatial:cubic-bezier(0.27,1.06,0.18,1);--motion-standard-slow-spatial:cubic-bezier(0.27,1.06,0.18,1);--motion-standard-fast-effects:cubic-bezier(0.31,0.94,0.34,1);--motion-standard-default-effects:cubic-bezier(0.34,0.8,0.34,1);--motion-standard-slow-effects:cubic-bezier(0.34,0.88,0.34,1);--motion-legacy-emphasized:cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1);--motion-legacy-emphasized-decelerate:cubic-bezier(0.05,0.7,0.1,1);--motion-legacy-emphasized-accelerate:cubic-bezier(0.3,0,0.8,0.15);--motion-legacy-standard:cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1);--motion-legacy-standard-decelerate:cubic-bezier(0,0,0,1);--motion-legacy-standard-accelerate:cubic-bezier(0.3,0,1,1);--motion-duration-expressive-fast-spatial:350ms;--motion-duration-expressive-default-spatial:500ms;--motion-duration-expressive-slow-spatial:650ms;--motion-duration-expressive-fast-effects:150ms;--motion-duration-expressive-default-effects:200ms;--motion-duration-expressive-slow-effects:300ms;--motion-duration-standard-fast-spatial:350ms;--motion-duration-standard-default-spatial:500ms;--motion-duration-standard-slow-spatial:750ms;--motion-duration-standard-fast-effects:150ms;--motion-du
